name: Parsons Corporation
description: Parsons Corporation is a leading technology provider in the global defense, intelligence, and critical infrastructure markets. The company delivers innovative solutions across various domains, including cybersecurity, missile defense, space, and connected infrastructure. With a focus on engineering and software-driven capabilities, Parsons supports government and commercial clients in solving complex technical challenges. Their expertise spans from protecting national security interests to designing sustainable urban environments, leveraging advanced technologies to create a safer, smarter, and more interconnected world.
